title: Energizing Thai Pastry Tart
description: Sweet and energizing Thai dessert featuring shortcrust pastry, deglaze-fond and a cheese-pull effect. Perfect for a raw-friendly treat.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the unsalted butter and confectioners sugar until light and fluffy.
Add the all-purpose flour, coconut cream, palm sugar, eggs, and salt to the bowl. Mix until a dough forms.
Wrap the dough in plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch (6 mm).
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch (23 cm) tart pan with a removable bottom.
Press the dough into the bottom and sides of the pan, trimming any excess dough from the edges.
Bake the crust for 20 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
While the crust is baking, combine the mozzarella cheese and vanilla extract in a bowl.
Remove the crust from the oven and sprinkle the mozzarella cheese mixture evenly over the top.
Bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and slightly golden brown.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
Use a skewer or fork to create a decorative border around the edges of the tart, if desired.
